title: Delegation
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 16.1 (ADR-005 consolidates 'Delegation Service'/'Delegation Resolution Engine' into delegation-service). Owned by delegation-service (epd2_delegation_service.domain.Delegation). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control: account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema (epd2_delegation_service.domain.FORBIDDEN_FIELD_NAMES) - only opaque delegator_actor_id/delegate_actor_id references are ever carried. `valid_until` is nullable but never implicit (canon prohibition #3, 'hidden indefinite delegation') - every construction site must consciously supply a concrete instant or an explicit null. `revocation_status` is an opaque, unvalidated string (canon gives it no enumerated value list).
